title: Melilotoides cachemiriana
intro: Melilotoides cachemiriana is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae, commonly found in the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering relief from various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Melilotoides cachemiriana include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional formulations such as Ayurvedic and Unani medicines, to harness its medicinal benefits.
